description: This file defines data transfer objects, constants, and classes related to linked modules, including API request/response models, module constants, and replication status enums for the demo asset .NET API.

classes.name: LinkedModuleContracts
classes.description: Contains constants and nested classes for linked module identifiers and allowed replication statuses.

classes.name: GetEfSourceMappingsForSiteRequest
classes.description: API request model for retrieving EF source mappings for a site.

classes.name: GetEfSourceMappingsForSiteResponse
classes.description: API response model containing EF source mappings for a site.

classes.name: EfSourceMappingDto
classes.description: Data transfer object representing EF source mapping details.

classes.name: ManageEfSourceMappingsRequest
classes.description: API request model for managing (upserting) EF source mappings.

classes.name: ManageEfSourceMappingsResponse
classes.description: API response model for managing EF source mappings.

classes.name: GetCalculatedThroughputInputsForSiteRequest
classes.description: API request model for retrieving throughput input parameters for a site.

classes.name: GetCalculatedThroughputInputsForSiteResponse
classes.description: API response model containing throughput equations for a site.

classes.name: CalculatedThroughputEquationDto
classes.description: Data transfer object for throughput equation setup.

classes.name: EquationScalarDto
classes.description: DTO for scalar values used in throughput equations.

classes.name: ManageCalculatedThroughputInputsRequest
classes.description: API request for managing throughput input equations.

classes.name: ManageCalculatedThroughputInputsResponse
classes.description: API response for managing throughput input equations.

classes.name: GenerateThroughputForInputParameterRequest
classes.description: Request model for generating throughput value for an input parameter.

classes.name: GenerateThroughputForInputParameterResponse
classes.description: Response model containing the generated throughput value.

classes.name: UpsertDataInputValueRequest
classes.description: Request model for persisting a data input value.

classes.name: UpsertDataInputValueResponse
classes.description: Response model for persisting a data input value.

classes.name: ReplicationStatus
classes.description: Enum representing the status of a replication operation.

classes.name: ReplicationModuleResultDto
classes.description: DTO representing the result of a replication for a single module.

classes.name: ReplicationOutcomeDto
classes.description: DTO representing the overall outcome of a replication operation.
